unitName: 領養中心的新朋友 | A New Friend at the Adoption Centre

article.title: A New Friend at the Adoption Centre 領養中心的新朋友

paragraphs.english: Lily was a shy and lonely girl. She just moved to a new school and could not make any friends. Her parents were worried about her, so they decided to take her to an animal adoption centre one Saturday morning.
sentences: Lily was a shy and lonely girl.
She just moved to a new school and could not make any friends.
Her parents were worried about her, so they decided to take her to an animal adoption centre one Saturday morning.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 莉莉是個害羞又孤單的女孩。她剛搬到一所新學校，交不到任何朋友。她的父母很擔心她，所以決定一個星期六早上帶她去動物領養中心。
translation_sentences: 🌐 莉莉是個害羞又孤單的女孩。
她剛搬到一所新學校，交不到任何朋友。
她的父母很擔心她，所以決定一個星期六早上帶她去動物領養中心。

implication.english: 💡 The story sets up Lily's problem: she is lonely after moving, and her parents try to help by visiting an adoption centre.
implication.chinese: 💡 故事設定莉莉的問題：搬家後感到孤單，父母試圖透過參觀領養中心來幫助她。[換句話說]：莉莉剛轉學沒朋友，爸媽看她悶悶不樂，就帶她去領養中心走走。

paragraphs.english: When they arrived at the centre, Lily saw a small brown mongrel dog in a cage. The dog looked scared and sad, just like Lily felt. Lily walked to the cage and gently touched the dog's head. The dog licked her hand softly and wagged its short tail. Lily's heart felt warm at that moment.
sentences: When they arrived at the centre, Lily saw a small brown mongrel dog in a cage.
The dog looked scared and sad, just like Lily felt.
Lily walked to the cage and gently touched the dog's head.
The dog licked her hand softly and wagged its short tail.
Lily's heart felt warm at that moment.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 當他們抵達中心時，莉莉看到一隻棕色的小米克斯狗關在籠子裡。狗看起來害怕又悲傷，就像莉莉的感覺一樣。莉莉走到籠子前，輕輕摸了摸狗的頭。狗輕輕舔了她的手，搖著短短的尾巴。那一刻，莉莉的心感到溫暖。
translation_sentences: 🌐 當他們抵達中心時，莉莉看到一隻棕色的小米克斯狗關在籠子裡。
狗看起來害怕又悲傷，就像莉莉的感覺一樣。
莉莉走到籠子前，輕輕摸了摸狗的頭。
狗輕輕舔了她的手，搖著短短的尾巴。
那一刻，莉莉的心感到溫暖。

implication.english: 💡 Lily feels an immediate connection with the scared dog; their emotions mirror each other.
implication.chinese: 💡 莉莉和那隻害怕的狗立刻產生了連結；他們的情感互相映照。[換句話說]：莉莉看到那隻狗好像看到自己，都一樣孤單害怕，忍不住伸手摸摸牠，沒想到狗也溫柔回應。

paragraphs.english: She asked her parents if they could adopt the dog, and they said yes! Lily named the dog Lucky. At home, Lucky stayed with Lily every day. She talked to Lucky about her school life, and Lucky would listen quietly and nuzzle her hand.
sentences: She asked her parents if they could adopt the dog, and they said yes!
At home, Lucky stayed with Lily every day.
She talked to Lucky about her school life, and Lucky would listen quietly and nuzzle her hand.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 她問父母能不能領養這隻狗，他們說好！莉莉給狗取名為樂奇。在家裡，樂奇每天都陪著莉莉。她跟樂奇聊學校生活，樂奇會靜靜地聽，然後用鼻子蹭她的手。
translation_sentences: 🌐 她問父母能不能領養這隻狗，他們說好！
在家裡，樂奇每天都陪著莉莉。
她跟樂奇聊學校生活，樂奇會靜靜地聽，然後用鼻子蹭她的手。

implication.english: 💡 Lucky becomes Lily's constant companion and confidant, showing the bond forming.
implication.chinese: 💡 樂奇成為莉莉的忠實夥伴和傾聽者，顯示他們之間建立了連結。[換句話說]：莉莉每天跟樂奇講心事，樂奇總是安靜聽著，好像真的懂她在說什麼。

paragraphs.english: Weeks later, Lily brought Lucky to the park near her school. Her classmates saw the cute dog and came to talk to her. They all loved Lucky and wanted to play with him. Lily made many new friends because of Lucky. She was no longer shy or lonely. Lucky was not just a pet for Lily—he was her best friend, and he brought happiness and friendship to her life.
sentences: Weeks later, Lily brought Lucky to the park near her school.
Her classmates saw the cute dog and came to talk to her.
They all loved Lucky and wanted to play with him.
Lily made many new friends because of Lucky.
She was no longer shy or lonely.
Lucky was not just a pet for Lily—he was her best friend, and he brought happiness and friendship to her life.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 幾週後，莉莉帶樂奇去學校附近的公園。她的同學看到這隻可愛的狗，都來跟她說話。他們都很喜歡樂奇，想和他玩。因為樂奇，莉莉交到了許多新朋友。她不再害羞或孤單。樂奇不只是莉莉的寵物，他是她最好的朋友，他為她的生活帶來了快樂和友誼。
translation_sentences: 🌐 幾週後，莉莉帶樂奇去學校附近的公園。
她的同學看到這隻可愛的狗，都來跟她說話。
他們都很喜歡樂奇，想和他玩。
因為樂奇，莉莉交到了許多新朋友。
樂奇不只是莉莉的寵物，他是她最好的朋友，他為她的生活帶來了快樂和友誼。

implication.english: 💡 Lucky helps Lily connect with classmates, transforming her social life and emotional state.
implication.chinese: 💡 樂奇幫助莉莉與同學建立連結，改變了她的社交生活和情感狀態。[換句話說]：因為樂奇，莉莉終於交到朋友了，不再覺得孤單，樂奇真的改變了她的人生。
